summary: Phase 5 (Learnings Pruning with Feedback Loop) planned. 5 tasks covering core pruning logic (analyzeLearningPatterns, archiveLearnings, pruneLearnings), barrel exports, CLI command (harness learnings prune), and integration tests.
pending: Task 1: Export parseDateFromEntry and add analyzeLearningPatterns (TDD)
Task 2: Add archiveLearnings and pruneLearnings core functions (TDD)
Task 3: Export new functions from core barrel files
Task 4: Create CLI harness learnings prune command
Task 5: Add CLI integration tests for learnings prune command
concerns: manage_roadmap add action has a known bug (fixed in this project but flagged for caution) -- the CLI prune command intentionally does NOT call manage_roadmap directly; it prints proposals for the human to act on
parseDateFromEntry is currently module-private and needs to be exported (Task 1)
decisions: CLI prints proposals to stdout rather than interactively calling manage_roadmap -- keeps it simple and human-in-the-loop
Pattern detection uses simple tag grouping ([skill:X], [outcome:Y]) with 3+ threshold per spec
Archive naming uses YYYY-MM.md and appends to existing files for the same month
Prune triggers when count exceeds 20 with old entries OR count exceeds 30 (aligns with spec thresholds)
Command registered as 'harness learnings prune' (new command group, not under 'harness state')
